title: The Chicago Neptune
description: 1 print : chromolithograph. | Illustration shows a large elderly colonial man labeled "N.Y." sitting atop buildings on New York City's waterfront, strings attached to his fingers extend to ships at dock and beyond, presumably to overseas connections.
